transcript: Speaker A: Hello. Speaker B: Hello. Speaker A: उम... आता काय बोलायचं? [Um... what to say now?] Speaker B: मला पण तेच कळत नाहीये. [I also don't understand that.] Speaker A: How are you, Neha? Speaker B: उम... आय एम... छान आहे मी. [Um... I am... I am good.] Speaker A: तसं नाही, असं बोल, "I am good". [Not like that, say it like this, "I am good".] Speaker B: Okay, I am good. Speaker C: MySivi ॲपवर १ कोटी लोकं स्पोकन इंग्लिशची प्रॅक्टिस करतायत. तुम्ही पण आजच सुरू करा. ट्रायल फक्त १ रुपयात. [Over 1 crore people are practicing spoken English on the MySivi app. You too start today. Trial for just 1 rupee.]

summary: The ad features a simulated voice call between two Marathi speakers practicing English on the MySivi app, paired with satisfying ASMR visuals. One speaker corrects the other's translation, demonstrating peer-to-peer learning. It ends with a call to action promoting a trial for just 1 rupee.
